verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ حمٓ
verses.text: Ḥā Mīm.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْكِتَٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
verses.text: By the clear Book!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍۢ مُّبَٰرَكَةٍ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
verses.text: Surely We sent it down on a blessed night – surely We were warning –

verses.quran_arabic: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
verses.text: during which every wise command was divided out,

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْرًۭا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
verses.text: as a command from Us – surely We were sending –

verses.quran_arabic: رَحْمَةًۭ مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: as a mercy from your Lord. Surely He – He is the Hearing, the Knowing,

verses.quran_arabic: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
verses.text: Lord of the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them, if you (would) be certain.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَآۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
canonical_variants.english: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ  إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
canonical_variants.english: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ إِن كُنتُمُۥ مُوقِنِينَ
canonical_variants.english: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ إِن كُنتُمُۥ مُوقِنِينَ
canonical_variants.english: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَالَارْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.

verses.quran_arabic: لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: (There is) no god but Him. He gives life and causes death – your Lord and the Lord of your fathers of old.

verses.quran_arabic: بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّۢ يَلْعَبُونَ
verses.text: No! They are in doubt (while) they jest.

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِى ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: So watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke

verses.quran_arabic: يَغْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ ۖ هَٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: covering the people: ‘This is a painful punishment!

verses.quran_arabic: رَّبَّنَا ٱكْشِفْ عَنَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Our Lord, remove the punishment from us! Surely We are believers.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: How will the reminder be for them, when a clear messenger has already come to them?

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌۭ مَّجْنُونٌ
verses.text: Then they turned away from him, and said, ‘(He is) tutored, (he is) possessed!’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا كَاشِفُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا ۚ إِنَّكُمْ عَآئِدُونَ
verses.text: ‘Surely We are going to remove the punishment a little, (but) surely you are going to revert!’

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ ٱلْبَطْشَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
verses.text: On the Day when We attack with the great attack, surely We are going to take vengeance.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌۭ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: Certainly before them We tested the people of Pharaoh, when an honorable messenger came to them:

verses.quran_arabic: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌۭ
verses.text: ‘Deliver to me the servants of God! Surely I am a trustworthy messenger for you.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: And: ‘Do not exalt yourselves against God! Surely I bring you clear authority.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنِّى عُذْتُ بِرَبِّى وَرَبِّكُمْ أَن تَرْجُمُونِ
verses.text: Surely I take refuge with my Lord and your Lord, for fear that you stone me.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ لِى فَٱعْتَزِلُونِ
verses.text: If you do not believe me, withdraw from me!’

verses.quran_arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌۭ مُّجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: So he called on his Lord: ‘These are a sinful people.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى لَيْلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
verses.text: And: ‘Journey with My servants by night. Surely you will be followed.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌۭ مُّغْرَقُونَ
verses.text: And leave the sea parted, (for) surely they are a force (to be) drowned.’

verses.quran_arabic: كَمْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِن جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍۢ
verses.text: How many gardens and springs they left (behind),

verses.quran_arabic: وَزُرُوعٍۢ وَمَقَامٍۢ كَرِيمٍۢ
verses.text: and (fields of) crops, and an honorable place,

verses.quran_arabic: وَنَعْمَةٍۢ كَانُوا۟ فِيهَا فَٰكِهِينَ
verses.text: and prosperity in which they used to rejoice.

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَأَوْرَثْنَٰهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
verses.text: So (it was), and We caused another people to inherit them.

verses.quran_arabic: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنظَرِينَ
verses.text: Neither the sky nor the earth wept for them, nor were they spared.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْمُهِينِ
verses.text: Certainly We rescued the Sons of Israel from the humiliating punishment,

verses.quran_arabic: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
verses.text: (and) from Pharaoh. Surely he was haughty, one of the wanton.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱخْتَرْنَٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Certainly We chose them, on (the basis of) knowledge, over the worlds,

verses.quran_arabic: وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلْءَايَٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَٰٓؤٌۭا۟ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: and gave them signs in which (there was) a clear test.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَيَقُولُونَ
verses.text: Surely these (people) indeed say,

verses.quran_arabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
verses.text: ‘There is nothing but our first death. We are not going to be raised.

verses.quran_arabic: فَأْتُوا۟ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Bring (back) our fathers, if you are truthful!’

verses.quran_arabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍۢ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ أَهْلَكْنَٰهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: Are they better, or the people of Tubba‘, and those who were before them? We destroyed them. Surely they were sinners.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لَٰعِبِينَ
verses.text: We did not create the heavens and earth, and whatever is between them, in jest.

verses.quran_arabic: مَا خَلَقْنَٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: We created them only in truth, but most of them do not know (it).

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ مِيقَٰتُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: Surely the Day of Decision is their meeting – all (of them) –

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًۭى شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: a Day when a protector will be of no use at all as a protector, and they will not be helped

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: – except for the one on whom God has compassion. Surely He – He is the Mighty, the Compassionate.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
verses.text: Surely the tree of al-Zaqqūm

verses.quran_arabic: طَعَامُ ٱلْأَثِيمِ
verses.text: is the food of the sinner,

verses.quran_arabic: كَٱلْمُهْلِ يَغْلِى فِى ٱلْبُطُونِ
verses.text: like molten metal boiling in the belly,

verses.quran_arabic: كَغَلْىِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
verses.text: as hot (water) boils.

verses.quran_arabic: خُذُوهُ فَٱعْتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: ‘Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Furnace.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
verses.text: Then pour over his head from the punishment of hot (water)!’

verses.quran_arabic: ذُقْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْكَرِيمُ
verses.text: ‘Taste (it)! Surely you are the mighty, the honorable!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ هَٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ
verses.text: Surely this is what you doubted about.’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍۢ
verses.text: Surely the ones who guard (themselves) are in a secure place,

verses.quran_arabic: فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍۢ
verses.text: in (the midst of) gardens and springs,

verses.quran_arabic: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍۢ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍۢ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
verses.text: wearing clothes of silk and brocade, facing each other.

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ وَزَوَّجْنَٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍۢ
verses.text: So (it is), and We shall marry them to (maidens) with dark, wide eyes.

verses.quran_arabic: يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فَٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
verses.text: There they will call for every (kind of) fruit, secure.

verses.quran_arabic: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ إِلَّا ٱلْمَوْتَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: There they will not taste death, except the first death, and He will guard them against the punishment of the Furnace.

verses.quran_arabic: فَضْلًۭا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.text: Favor from your Lord! That is the great triumph!

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Surely We have made it easy in your language, so that they may take heed.

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ إِنَّهُم مُّرْتَقِبُونَ
verses.text: So watch! Surely they (too) are watching.
